name: extend-file-upload
title: File Upload
author: Extend UI contributors
description: Accepts files through click, keyboard, or drag and drop, validates file types, and renders a compact ready-state list.

changes: Repointed the FileThumbnail import to the Taste Blocks install target.
Added a visible keyboard focus ring and a polite live-region announcement for rejected files.

notices: Direct dependency licenses are recorded in registry/sources/extend-ui/DEPENDENCIES.md.

modifications.change: Repointed the FileThumbnail import to the Taste Blocks install target. Added a visible keyboard focus ring and a polite live-region announcement for rejected files.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component install-complete with its source-backed thumbnail dependency and expose validation feedback to keyboard and screen-reader users.
